xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: TVS Building, 7-B West Veli Street, Madurai 625 001
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: No.10, Jawahar Road, Madurai 625 002. Tamil Nadu.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: Manufacture of rubber tyres and tubes for motor vehicles, motorcycles, scooters, three-wheelers, tractors and aircraft
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: Domestically, the company supplies tyres to vehicle manufacturers (commonly known as Original Equipment Manufacturers - OEMs) as well as the replacement market, serviced through a network of depots, distributors and retailers. The company also sells its range of products in the global markets.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheHoldingOrSubsidiaryAs: Fiber Optic Sensing Solutions Private Limited
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RemarksStakeHolderGroupFromWho: Palapilly Crumb payment unresolved. Filed cyber crime case.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: 1.Company has carried out Scope 1 and 2 audit through external consultant and worked out the action plan to further reduce the carbon foot print 2. The Company maximises the use of renewable energy sources. The renewable power consumption in Madurai plant increased from 74% to 80 %. 3. Company successfully uses 100% biomass fuel for steam generation in the Uttarakhand plant. 4. Company successfully completed 1MW roof top plant in UKD plant #2 5 Company has successfully reduced the Specific power consumption by 3 % in Madurai facility 6. Company has successfully reduced the specific steam consumption by 5.6% through introduction of trap monitoring system and energy saving measures 7. Madurai plant maintained zero liquid discharge plant ensuring zero water pollution. 8. Company provides ESP (Electrostatic Precipitators) in the boiler outlets to ensure clean chimneys.
In the past, the company's operations have been concentrated in a few segments and geographies.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The company has embarked on a program to enlarge its presence in a larger number of segments (product as well as customer). In addition, greater focus on global markets has also been initiated.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: • Raw material price volatility can affect budgeted product costing. • Disturbances in global economy could lead to supply chain disruption, thereby impact on-time delivery of raw materials
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: • The company optimises its cost by Strategic sourcing of seasonal inputs and entering long term contracts with key suppliers. • Supply security is protected with maximising domestic business share and on-boarding multiple vendors for each raw material.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: The market is dynamically changing, rising demand from more sustainable materials usage, rising EV segments, stringent performance requirements, increasing demand to delivery in short time frame provides an opportunity to deliver innovative products and services.
Demand-Supply mismatch, global economic policy changes leading to surge in raw material prices and reducing company's contribution.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Standardisation, more of commodity inputs that are locally available rather than speciality materials and cost competitive imports from FTA countries are few of the business approaches done by the company to control input costs.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: The company has taken initiatives to align its organisation structure, build organisation capabilities and engage with employees.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar: The company's functional leadership is responsible for ensuring compliance with the NGRBC principles. Our goal is to reduce the Carbon footprint in Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 50 % by 2030 compared to the base line

The company's functional leadership is responsible for ensuring compliance with the NGRBC principles. Our goal is to reduce the Carbon footprint in Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 50 % by 2030 compared to the base line

The company's functional leadership is responsible for ensuring compliance with the NGRBC principles. Our goal is to reduce the Carbon footprint in Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 50 % by 2030 compared to the base line
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PerformanceOfTheEntityAgainstT: The company has formally created the Sustainability cell in Manufacturing plants, Completed Scope 1 and 2 measurement audit and worked out the carbon footprint along with De - Carbonization action plan. Company has worked out a goal to reduce the carbon footprint in scope 1 and 2 by 50 % by 2030

The company has formally created the Sustainability cell in Manufacturing plants, Completed Scope 1 and 2 measurement audit and worked out the carbon footprint along with De - Carbonization action plan. Company has worked out a goal to reduce the carbon footprint in scope 1 and 2 by 50 % by 2030

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible:
Considering the nature of business of the company, ensuring that the environment is not adversely impacted either directly or indirectly by the operations of the company is a key ESG related challenge.
We give utmost importance to all ESG aspects in our business decisions. We have increased renewable energy consumption, recycling of the wastes, reduced the usage of fossil fuels - in an effort to contribute to the circular economy.
Our performance against each principle of National Guideline on Responsible Business Conduct is stated in Section C of this report.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT: Yes, the Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) Committee is responsible for making decisions on sustainability issues.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfOtherFrequencyFor: Policies are reviewed depending upon applicable laws and whenever there is a need.
Policies are reviewed depending upon applicable laws and whenever there is a need.
Policies are reviewed depending upon applicable laws and whenever there is a need.
Policies are reviewed depending upon applicable laws and whenever there is a need.

The policies are reviewed as prescribed under applicable laws.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: Skill development, health and safety and managerial excellence
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: Yes - The Company's Code of Conduct for Employees includes a section on anti-bribery / anti-corruption.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImprovementsInEnviron: R&D We continuously strive to develop tyres to reduce the overall CO2 emission by using sustainable materials, recycled materials, etc... also adopt the least energy input-based tyre manufacturing process.

Others 1) Use of electric vehicles for intra-plant movement, which is eco-friendly and helps in reducing the carbon footprint. 2) Adoption of technologies that help to promote fuel savings, thermal energy savings, avoid air pollution and reduce the depletion of natural resources. 3) Green belt plantation at plants 4) Number of measures taken for energy savings, power quality improvement and avoiding pollution. 5) Rainwater harvesting to improve the groundwater level.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: Plastic scrap is sold to licensed scrap trader.
E-waste is sold to the agencies authorised by TNPCB
Hazardous waste is sold to the agencies authorised by TNPCB
End-of-the-life products are disposed in compliance with EPR policies stipulated by CPCB
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: Employees can bring their grievances to the HR department through Union committee members or via their supervisor. If required, they can raise the grievances directly to HR and respective functional heads for clarification. A separate Family Counselling Center (FCC) also functions to keep the grievances handling on the right path and also for employee easy access to raise grievances.

These employees can report their grievances to their respective HRBP representative or the Head HR. The company, on a regular basis, sensitizes its employees on the prevention of the sexual harassment at the workplace, through workshops, group meetings, online training modules, and awareness programs.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: Yes, manufacturing units of the company have an occupational health and safety management system ISO45001:2018 in place. It covers 100% of our employees, workers, visitors, contractual service providers, suppliers. Coverage is 100%. The company's Occupational Health Safety & Environment policy works as a guiding document to implement, monitor and assess the occupational health and safety management system. OHSE risk is monitored during regular safety committee meetings, monthly review meeting with senior team, safety audits, various OHSE training/ awareness (Induction/ PEP Talk/ On the Job Training (OJT)/ Fire Safety etc.,), work permit system, etc
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: Routine risks are assessed through conducting regular Hazard Identification & Risk Assessments (HIRA) and controlled through standard operating procedures, operational control procedures, visual display signages, safety audits, inspections, etc., Non-routine activities which may have hazards and related risks are assessed through conducting Job Safety Analysis (JSA) by expert teams (safety officer, engineering head, area head, contractor, safety committee member). Safety procedure has been developed for execution on all non routine activity. All critical activities are monitored through 8 types of work permits to ensure the health and safety of man, machines and materials. These are: a) Hot work permit b) Confined space entry permit c) Height work permit d) Night work permit e) Excavation work permit f) Lock Out Tag Out (LOTO) work permit g) Lifting work permit h) Heavy vehicle entry permit We have various forums to record work related risks by consultation and participation of employees/workers in safety committee meetings, daily review meetings, PEP talks and shift start up meetings. Based on the nature of the recorded observations, actions are taken by supervisors and reviewed by the safety officer. This is horizontally deployed in all respective areas as corrective actions and are regularly reviewed.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: The company strives to achieve a target of “ZERO ACCIDENTS, ZERO HEALTH HAZARDS AND ZERO LIQUID DISCHARGE”. The company's Occupational Health Safety and Environment (OHSE) policy covers the manufacturing plants of the company. The scope extends to employees and contractors. We conduct internal audits and third-party audits with experts at regular intervals, for identification and elimination of unsafe acts and unsafe working conditions. As part of the initiative of implementing good safety practices, at the beginning of the shift, operators conduct a self check of safety devices located on their machines. We regularly conduct safety awareness programs on the shop floor through safety PEP talks, KY training , fire & life support training, Do's & Dont's, including training through visual control displays. We follow a stringent practice of work permits system to ensure safe working methods are in place. We have conducted mass safety awareness programs during National Safety Month celebrations, Road Safety Week celebrations, World Environmenty Day for employees and their family members. We conduct periodical medical examinations and also health related awareness programmes for all employees.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: We have a defined audit system to carry out internal & external audits of environmental, occupational health & safety parameters. Corrective actions for all categories of incidents/significant risks are identified and suitable actions are taken. We have developed a pool of internal auditors trained in the different ISO standards to review compliances periodically. Internal audits are conducted twice a year and external audits are conducted by a third party. Opportunities for improvement and non compliances raised in the internal/external audits are addressed. These are reviewed in monthly review meetings.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: The policies of the company provide the approach for identifying and engaging with stakeholders that include shareholders, customers, employees, suppliers, communities, civil society, media and the government. The company believes that an effective stakeholder engagement process is necessary for achieving its sustainability goal of inclusive growth. The company has put in place systems and procedures to identify, prioritize, and address the needs and concerns of its stakeholders across businesses and units in a continuous, consistent, and systematic manner so that the stakeholder priorities and interests are attended to and all their concerns are addressed.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Email, meetings, newspaper, company website, stock exchanges, other statutory authority
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherFrequencyOfEngag: Regularly through company’s website and website of stock exchanges, through annual general meetings
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Disseminating and sharing of information with the shareholders with a view to update
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StakeholderGroup: All local residents living within the vicinity of the plant
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Designated representative is available to have a periodical communication, handling grievances and maintaining smooth relationship.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: To maintain a smooth relationship as to ensure harmonies environment to run the plant amicably.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Town hall, notice board, meeting, pep talk at shop floor
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: 1.Communicate the business requirements and priorities. 2.Family counselling. 3.Employee engagement programme
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Physical meetings, dealer meets, audits, loyalty programmes, 1 on 1 interactions, whatsapp communication.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Customer relationship, product knowledge, business development.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Supplier meets, audits, physical meetings and email
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherFrequencyOfEngag: Engaged on daily, monthly and quarterly basis.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: The company has grievance and harassment forums such as FCC, Union committee to address issues relating to human rights.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons:
Employees with complaints related to discrimination can contact the HR team. The head of HR reviews the complaint, investigates, and sends all relevant information regarding the case for further discussion and action. If necessary, the issue may be reviewed with the Managing Director.
For cases of sexual harassment, the company has established an Internal Complaints Committee in accordance with the guidelines of the Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013 (POSH Act). Throughout the process, the confidentiality of the reporter is maintained, ensuring a safe environment for employees and workers to report any discrimination or harassment issues.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyThatUnd: Independent assessment carried out in Madurai plant by: 1. Armstrong International Private Limited (Steam audit) 2. Onrgy services Pvt ltd (Electrical power and steam)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfCoverageAndImplementa: Yes the entity has implemented a mechanism for Zero liquid discharge. The Madurai factory are equipped with Electro Static Precipitators (ESP) in Boilers, to reduce particulate matter in ambient, Zero Liquid Discharge (ZLD) waste water treatment plants.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyIfAnyIn: Yes, independent assessment has been carried out by external agencies, plant wise. Details are as follows: Madurai Plant - Ayvu Laboratory Uttarakhand Plant – Arihant Analytical Laboratory Pvt Ltd.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProjectRelatedToReduc: Yes, the entity has the following projects related to reducing green house gas emission based on the Scope 1 and 2 audit: 1. Installation of 5 MWp GCP Solar plant for UKD plant #1 2. Installation of 6 MWp GCP Solar plant for Madurai plant 3. Specific Steam consumption reduction through optimizig the steam network and reduction in thermal losses 4. Specific Power consumption reduction through Energy conservation projects
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: 1. Wastewater coming out of cooling towers is treated by an ETP. The reject water from the ETP is further treated through evaporator. The reject is converted into the form of salts through the evaporator. The result is the maintenance and sustenance of zero liquid discharge. 2. Wastewater from toilets is treated in the STP and recycled. This also contributes to zero liquid discharge. 3. All our boilers are equipped with ESPs to significantly reduce particulate emission and maintain green chimneys. 4. Solid wastes generated from rejected tyres in process defective materials are disposed of through specified recycling contractors. 5. Generated sludge is stored and sold through TNPCB authorized disposal agencies. 6. Ash generated from boilers is sold to fly ash brick manufacturers as raw materials. 7. To prevent the bad odor from chemical wet sludge generated from ETP process, we have installed sludge dryer machine to make the sludge into powder form, as well as weight reduction to reduce disposal cost. 8. To improve the water treatment quality, we have provided one additional aeration tank in STP.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: The company engages with communities through CSR initiatives conducted by NGOs. These NGOs are responsible for addressing and resolving grievances from the community.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: The company has in place processes and a dedicated team for customers to reach out. There are multiple touch points though whom a quick solutions are provided.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: No actions taken related to advertising, delivery of essential services, cybersecurity and data privacy of customers, product recalls, or any penalties/actions taken by regulatory authorities concerning the safety of our products or services.
